Name: Guerrilla Clans
Description: A reclusive and enigmatic force, the Guerrilla Clans are a masterclass in asymmetrical warfare, leveraging their mastery of disappearance, environmental navigation, and unconventional technology to outmaneuver and outlast their foes.
Core Philosophy: A culture of quiet observation, where patience, study, and an intimate connection with the environment are the keys to success.

Tactical Applications.name: Leap-Charms
Tactical Applications.description: Provides the user with a single, silent 50-foot jump.
Tactical Applications.function: Force multiplier for rapid and silent repositioning.

Tactical Applications.name: Pop-Bolts
Tactical Applications.description: A standard crossbow bolt enchanted to explode in a silent, concussive burst upon impact.
Tactical Applications.function: Non-lethal tool for stunning sentries, creating powerful diversions, and disrupting enemy formations.

Technology.name: Charm
Technology.description: A simple, single-use sigil painted by a 'hedge-wizard' to execute a specific guerrilla application.
Technology.function: Tactical tool for precision ambushes, sabotage, and psychological warfare.

Technology.name: Leap-Charms
Technology.description: Provides the user with a single, silent 50-foot jump.
Technology.function: Force multiplier for rapid and silent repositioning.

Technology.function: Non-lethal tool for stunning sentries, creating powerful diversions, and disrupting enemy formations.

Social Structure.name: Constituent Peoples
Social Structure.description: A confederation of peoples known for their agility and keen senses: primarily small cats, rabbits, and rodent people.
Social Structure.function: Force multiplier for their military strategy.

Social Structure.name: Settlement Patterns
Social Structure.description: Semi-nomadic or subterranean and camouflaged settlements designed to maintain security and mobility.
Social Structure.function: Force multiplier for their military strategy.

Communication Methods.name: Whispering Network
Communication Methods.description: A discreet and efficient communication system utilizing natural sounds, specific animal calls, and subtle trail markers.

Geopolitical Role and Foreign Relations.name: Primary Alliance
Geopolitical Role and Foreign Relations.function: Mutual respect for self-determination and capability gaps.

Geopolitical Role and Foreign Relations.name: Strict Protocol for Engagement
Geopolitical Role and Foreign Relations.description: A rigid and specific protocol for outsiders seeking a formal meeting.
